questions.question_text: What do you know about the poetry of the Seven Mu'allaqat?
Who is Al-Farazdaq? Write in detail about his life and poetic contributions.
Discuss the reasons for the flourishing of poetry in the Abbasid era.
How has the novel evolved in the modern era with reference to the works of Naguib Mahfouz?
Write about the life of Ahmed Shawqi and his poetic contributions in detail.
Provide a brief article about Shah Waliullah along with his literary works.
Write an essay on the following topics: (a) The art of oratory in the Umayyad era (b) Criticism in Arabic literature (c) Diwan Al-Hamasah (d) Quss Ibn Sa'idah
